message:
chore(beads): bulk reassign to PinkForge, close progress events and agent diff tasks

- All 67 tracked issues reassigned to PinkForge with updated timestamps
- bd-2c0w (agent diff focus options): closed — FocusMode parsing and
  validation implemented with test for invalid focus values
- process_triage-f5o (progress event emission): closed — events module,
  emitters, JSONL writer, and scan/infer/decide/action hooks implemented
- bd-yaps (no-mock bundle/report tests): moved to blocked pending
  process_triage-aii.7.6, process_triage-aii.7.7, and bd-jg2d
- process_triage-21f.1 (Bayesian credible bounds): moved to blocked

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
